name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the AI Accelerator Starter Packs
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your request related to a specific use case or limitation you've encountered?

<!-- Example: "I need to deploy the VSS starter pack into a private VCN but there's no way to configure X." -->

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Affected Area

Which part of the project does this request apply to?

- [ ] Starter pack: <!-- cuopt / vss / paas_rag / enterprise_rag / enterprise_rag_aiq / new pack -->
- [ ] Networking / VCN configuration
- [ ] IAM policies
- [ ] OCI Resource Manager schema / UI
- [ ] Terraform variables or outputs
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / testing
- [ ] Other:

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? If so, describe them and why they don't fully solve the problem.

## Additional Context

Any links, references, screenshots, or other context that would help understand the request.
